step_rationale: Serum biomarker in atherosclerosis; elevated in MI-prone models; core lipid in plaque retention.
mechanism: Triacylglycerol-rich lipoproteins are retained in plaque and promote atherogenesis and plaque vulnerability.

references.journal: Journal of agricultural and food chemistry

references.title: Lipidomic analysis of plasma lipoprotein fractions in myocardial infarction-prone rabbits.

trials.title: Effects of a High-dose Concentrate of n-3 Fatty Acids or Corn Oil Introduced Early After an Acute Myocardial Infarction on Serum Triacylglycerol and High-density Lipoprotein (HDL)- Cholesterol
